description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a spacious, landscaped lot featuring lush gardens, a tennis court, and a swimming pool. The building itself has a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist rectangular form, emphasizing open-plan living. The front facade is defined by a wide entrance, a covered porch area, and extensive glazing that connects the interior to the outdoor spaces. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a patio and pool area, with sliding glass doors providing seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The property is enclosed by a low wall and features a mix of manicured lawns, shrubs, and mature trees. The overall design is characterized by clean lines, a neutral color palette, and a strong connection to the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and open-plan design, set in a landscaped lot with a pool and tennis court.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the bungalow with the main entrance, covered porch, and landscaped gardens in the foreground.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the bungalow, showcasing the swimming pool, patio, and extensive glazing facing the backyard.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, revealing the tennis court, side gardens, and the bungalow's elongated rectangular shape.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, emphasizing the boundary wall, additional greenery, and the overall depth of the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
